summary: Bank Loan Offers feature fully tested. All 5 backend APIs working (13/13 pytest tests passed). Frontend UI verified - Loans page displays loan leads with offers, Loan Processing Modal shows bank eligibility and offers, Bank Offers Modal displays detailed charges breakdown and net disbursal calculation.
critical_code_review_comments: All Bank Loan Offers APIs implemented correctly with proper authentication
Offer charges calculation is accurate (processing fee percentage, fixed charges, waived charges)
Negotiation history is properly tracked with timestamps and user info
Net disbursal calculation: total_loan_amount - total_charges (excluding waived)
Manual offer creation works with bank_id parameter (required)
Frontend properly displays offer cards with loan amount, net disbursal, EMI
Accept offer flow updates both offer status and application status
seed_data_creation: Test offers created during pytest: multiple offers for lead c6691f1f-ecbc-446a-ab92-be5386eff6f7
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Loan Offers feature fully implemented and tested. Test lead: Rajesh Sharma (c6691f1f-ecbc-446a-ab92-be5386eff6f7) has 7+ offers from Axis Bank, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank. One offer accepted (Axis Bank). APIs: GET/POST offers, POST manual-offer, POST accept, PUT update (negotiation). Frontend: Loans page → Click Check → Loan Processing Modal → View Offers → Bank Offers Modal.

features_tested.GET_loan_offers: PASS - Returns all offers for a lead with charges breakdown
features_tested.POST_create_offer: PASS - Creates offer from application with calculated charges
features_tested.POST_manual_offer: PASS - Creates manual offer with bank_id (required parameter)
features_tested.POST_accept_offer: PASS - Accepts offer and sets final_net_disbursal
features_tested.PUT_update_offer: PASS - Updates charges for negotiation, tracks history
features_tested.Loans_page_UI: PASS - Displays loan leads with offer status (OFFER RECEIVED, OFFER ACCEPTED)
features_tested.Loan_Processing_Modal: PASS - Shows vehicle details, eligibility check, active applications, bank offers summary
features_tested.Bank_Offers_Modal: PASS - Shows detailed offer breakdown with charges, net disbursal, accept/negotiate options

mocked_apis.POST /api/loan-leads/{lead_id}/vehicles/: MOCKED - Returns random 70% approval rate with mock eligibility results

screenshots_taken: 02_loans_page.png - Loans page with loan leads table
03_loan_processing_modal.png - Loan Processing Modal with vehicle details and offers
04_bank_offers_modal.png - Bank Offers Modal with detailed charges breakdown
